MINI MINUTES: Judge Peter Busch; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff John Stewart Comapny is present. Represented by Doris Tydus.
Attorney John Zanghi appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Vanessa Williams is present.
Attorney Kristin Messer representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Paul Gutierrez, litigants and counsel confer in Dept.504A , for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of May 28, 2013 is vacated. (501/JPT)
